title: 76mm 3'' Hole Saw, Bi-Metal Hole Saw Drill Bit High Speed Steel, Cutting Circular Holes, for Wood and Metal, Can Easily Drill Wood, Plastic, Plywood, Thin Metal
features: [Hole saw size] 3''(76MM).Can be used for plastic PVC pipe, cork desk/desk, plasterboard, furniture and cabinets, and for installing handles and locks the door.36 sizes are available：18/20/22/25/28/29/30/32/35/38/40/45/51/60/65/68/70/74/76/83/86/92/100/110/115/120/127/130/140/145/150/155/160/180/190MM.Below 51mm Size, the effective cutting depth is 25mm, and above is 32mm.

[Material] High Speed Steel (HSS) Bi-metal Made of heat treated and rust proof function,Great heat resistance and anti-abrasive,High speed steel teeth for fast and clean cuts, boasts advantages of high-performance, rust protection and durable,was built tough for repeat use.

[Wide Application Scenarios] With ultra sharp serrations for faster and cleaner cutting, High precision, smooth cutting edges,much more durable andcan offer a longer life.Versatile cutter that can be used in a wide variety of applications.Ideal for wood and metal, it can easily drill wood, plastic, plywood, thin metal.

[Tip] When using the hole opener kit for a long time, please control the rotation speed appropriately, RPM≤1000, it is easy to cause high-speed wear of the hole opener. The surface of the product is coated with a thin layer of protective oil (anti-oxidation, anti-rust), please be careful not to stain and check the condition of the hole opener.

[100% Satisfaction] Provide 60 days free return and replace service to make sure our customers’ satisfaction with every purchase. If you got imperfect Hole Saws, just contact us via email directly, we will be responsible for the quality of our products, just enjoy your purchase!
description: Product Description Dribotway Hole Saw Bi-Metal Hole Saw Bit HSS, with a Shank,Cutting Circular Holes，36 Sizes Available 36 Sizes Available 18mm/ 20mm/ 22mm/ 25mm/ 28mm/ 29mm/ 30mm/ 32mm/ 35mm/ 38mm/ 40mm/ 45mm/ 51mm/ 60mm/ 65mm/ 68mm/ 70mm/ 74mm/ 76mm/ 83mm/ 86mm/ 92mm/ 100mm/ 110mm/ 115mm/ 120mm/ 127mm/ 130mm/ 140mm/ 145mm/ 150mm/ 155mm/ 160mm/ 180mm/ 190mm. Professional Quality Material:M42 HSS and Bi-Metal; Suitable for: drilling metal sheet, drywall, plastic pipe, wood, PVC, fiberboard, grommet hole, recessed light； The hole saw adopts the front and back tilting tooth type, the knife is sharp, the vibration is small, and the hole is opened quickly and smoothly; Multi-directional chip removal hole design makes drilling smoother and improves work efficiency. FOCUS ON PRODUCT DETAILS CHIP HOLE DESIGN The chip removal groove added on the side of the hole saw can discharge the chip rapidly. EXCELLENT QUALITY Hole saw is made of M42 High Speed Steel and BI-Metal for higher hardness(≥64HRC) and higher toughness. Use special heating process to extend service life and protect rust. CONVENIENT USE The Sharp teeth is perfect for hole cutting on soft metal, wood, PVC board, plastic and drywall. Cutting clean, smooth and high precision. Not recommend used in hard wood, hard metal and stone. EASY TO USE Compatible with most drills of other manufacturers. This hole saw is a great ideal for work where high performance and accuracy are needed. WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS Advantages of our Bi-Metal Hole Saws This Hole Saw with ultra sharp serrations for faster and cleaner cutting, High precision, smooth cutting edges,much more durable andcan offer a longer life.Versatile cutter that can be used in a wide variety of applications; Ideal for plumbing, construction, aircraft, electrical, maintenance and automotive applications. How to Install: Install the pilot hole and the hole saw. Holding the drill straight to cutting surface and drill as clockwise rotation. When starting drilling, cutting at a slow speed and holding steady pressure. Then the hole saw cut hole in no time.
